all.en: This document outlines the standard procedure for replenishing inventory at our distribution center.
all.zh: 本文件說明本配送中心庫存補貨的標準程序。

all.en: Replenishment cycles run twice daily at six in the morning and two in the afternoon.
all.zh: 補貨週期每日兩次，分別於上午六時及下午二時執行。

all.en: The warehouse management system generates a pick list based on current stock levels.
all.zh: 倉庫管理系統依據當前庫存水位產生揀貨清單。

all.en: Reorder points are set at twenty percent of average monthly consumption.
all.zh: 再訂購點設定為平均月使用量的百分之二十。

all.en: Safety stock for fast moving items is maintained at ten business days of demand.
all.zh: 暢銷品的安全庫存維持在十個營業日的需求量。

all.en: Replenishment tasks are assigned to operators through handheld scanners.
all.zh: 補貨任務透過手持掃描器分派給作業員。

all.en: Operators must scan the source location before picking any pallet.
all.zh: 作業員揀貨前須先掃描來源儲位。

all.en: Quantities are confirmed against the system before the move is completed.
all.zh: 於完成移動前須與系統比對確認數量。

all.en: Any discrepancy greater than two units must be reported to the supervisor.
all.zh: 任何大於二件的差異必須通報主管。

all.en: Forward pick locations are limited to one pallet height for ergonomic reasons.
all.zh: 前線揀貨位基於人因考量限為一個棧板高度。

all.en: Bulk reserve storage occupies the upper three levels of each rack.
all.zh: 整箱備品儲存佔用每組貨架的上方三層。

all.en: Temperature controlled items follow a separate replenishment workflow.
all.zh: 溫控品項適用獨立的補貨流程。

all.en: Hazardous materials require dual operator verification at every step.
all.zh: 危險物料每一步驟均需兩名作業員確認。

all.en: The team aims to complete each replenishment cycle within ninety minutes.
all.zh: 團隊目標於九十分鐘內完成每次補貨循環。

all.en: Daily exception reports highlight any tasks not closed within the cycle window.
all.zh: 每日例外報表列出於循環時段內未結案的任務。

all.en: Cycle counts are triggered automatically when stock falls below the threshold.
all.zh: 當庫存低於門檻時將自動觸發循環盤點。

all.en: Slotting reviews are performed every quarter to optimize travel distances.
all.zh: 儲位配置檢討每季執行一次以優化移動距離。

all.en: Seasonal items receive temporary slots closer to the shipping dock.
all.zh: 季節性品項獲配置接近出貨碼頭的臨時儲位。

all.en: Damaged stock encountered during replenishment must be quarantined immediately.
all.zh: 補貨過程中發現的損壞庫存須立即隔離。

all.en: Replenishment productivity is tracked at the operator and shift level.
all.zh: 補貨生產力以作業員及班次為單位進行追蹤。

all.en: Continuous improvement suggestions are welcomed through the weekly huddle.
all.zh: 歡迎於每週站立會議中提出持續改善建議。

all.en: Training certification is required before any operator performs solo replenishment.
all.zh: 作業員獨立執行補貨前須先取得訓練認證。

all.en: All procedural changes must be approved by the operations manager.
all.zh: 所有流程變更均須經營運經理核可。

all.en: This procedure is reviewed annually or whenever significant process changes occur.
all.zh: 本程序每年或重大流程變更時進行檢討。

all.en: Questions regarding this procedure should be directed to the inventory control team.
all.zh: 本程序相關疑問應洽詢庫存管理團隊。
